title: Acceptance-testing guidance applies requiresImport and ImportStep expectations consistently

provenance.originSummary: Derived from a sanitized real PR or review incident.
provenance.whyItMattered: Use this as the first direct acceptance-testing skill benchmark for lifecycle-coverage guidance.
provenance.genericCondition: Sanitized fixture models a real acceptance-test guidance incident without retaining live PR identity.

description: A sanitized modeled acceptance-test guidance scenario where the correct output should restore requiresImport coverage, keep ExistsInAzure as the primary basic assertion, and avoid redundant ImportStep assertions.

scope.notes: Sanitized fixture models a acceptance-testing guidance benchmark.

mustCatch.description: The guidance should preserve default requiresImport expectations when they apply.
The guidance should restore ExistsInAzure as the primary basic existence check instead of using a weaker substitute.

mustNotFlag.description: The guidance should not require redundant assertions already covered by ImportStep unless a case-specific exception exists.

notes: Use this as the first direct acceptance-testing skill benchmark for lifecycle-coverage guidance.
